0.rule_description: Escalate to Regional Compliance Lead if supplier is not registered or sanctioned-screened in the delivery country and the currency is USD

1.rule_description: Escalates to Marketing Governance Lead when a brand safety review is needed.

2.rule_description: Escalates to Sourcing Excellence Lead due to single-supplier capacity risk.

3.rule_description: Escalates to Security and Compliance Review due to data residency constraint conflict.

4.rule_description: Escalates to Head of Category when no compliant supplier is found.

5.rule_description: Escalates to Head of Strategic Sourcing when value exceeds threshold.

6.rule_description: Escalate to Procurement Manager when preferred supplier is restricted.

7.rule_description: Escalates to requester clarification due to missing required information.
